subject: Bramgrim
fact: The party decides to save Bramgrim's True Seeing spell for the direct encounter with Maram il Vass.
source_quote: The party decides to save Bramgrim's True Seeing spell for the direct encounter with Maram il Vass

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim vehemently refused the trade of Felkur.

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur considers using his infusion ability to create fake rare magical items that only last eight hours.
source_quote: Felkur considers using his infusion ability to create fake rare magical items that only last eight hours

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass reluctantly agrees to the party's request for privacy.
source_quote: Maram il Vass reluctantly agrees to their privacy

subject: Teegan
fact: Teegan refuses to follow the party further into the palace.
source_quote: She refuses to follow the party further into the palace

subject: Drystan
fact: Drystan is found in a state of mental breakdown, having succumbed to torture and the maddening winds.
source_quote: He is found in a state of mental breakdown, rocking and with self-inflicted wounds from shoving a pointed stick into both of his ears, having succumbed to torture and the maddening winds
